Premier Forensic Products Supplier for Law Enforcement & Evidence Imaging
EVIDENT's website provides an accessible and efficient platform for law enforcement agencies to equip themselves with the essential tools of their trade. With the convenience of online browsing and secure payment options, customers can confidently place orders using credit cards or purchase orders. Whether on the field or in the lab, EVIDENT stands as a steadfast partner, dedicated to empowering law enforcement agencies with the tools they need to uphold justice and uncover the truth. Some of the features allow for:
Completing the purchase with a credit card
Saving the shopping cart into a wishlist
Saving the shopping cart as a Request for Quote (RFQ)
Converting an RFQ into a cart for immediate checkout
Start Shopping
Login to Your Account
For over three decades, EVIDENT has established itself as a premier provider of top-tier forensic products and equipment, catering to law enforcement agencies globally. With a steadfast commitment to quality, EVIDENT has been a trusted partner for law enforcement professionals seeking reliable tools for their investigative needs.
Our extensive product line covers a diverse range of forensic supplies and equipment, supporting law enforcement agencies in their mission to uncover and document crucial evidence. From crime scenes to laboratory analysis, EVIDENT's offerings are designed to meet the rigorous demands of the forensic field.
Shop our product line
here and complete your orders with a credit card or purchase order.
One of EVIDENT's distinctive features is its exclusive partnership with ForenScope, the renowned manufacturer of cutting-edge imaging devices. These devices play a pivotal role in locating and documenting evidence within crime scenes and laboratory settings. Visitors to the EVIDENT website have the opportunity to explore and select ForenScope imaging devices, which can be seamlessly added to their online shopping cart. For those seeking specific pricing details, EVIDENT offers a streamlined process. By submitting a Request for Quotation (RFQ), customers can swiftly obtain accurate pricing information for the selected ForenScope devices.
Add the
ForenScope devices
to your cart and submit as an RFQ to receive your pricing.

Contact Us
We're thrilled to hear from you. Whether you have questions about our products, need assistance with an order, or simply want to share your feedback, our team is here to help. Please fill out the form below, and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
Please be aware that we are unable to accept inquiries or process orders for countries that are not listed in the dropdown menu of available countries.
